text.title: decision-tree-tech-stack Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for decision-tree-tech-stack as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent recommends a technology purely on benchmark scores, ignoring that the team has zero experience with it.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Team expertise must be weighted at 25%+ in the matrix. A 10% performance advantage does not justify 3-6 months of ramp-up on an unfamiliar stack.

failure-mode.description: Agent outputs a single recommendation without the runner-up and its key trade-off.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Forcing the runner-up reveals the most fragile input and what would flip the decision — essential context for the architect.

failure-mode.description: Agent uses stale 2023 market share data (e.g., Angular at 30% usage) without refreshing.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Technology landscapes shift fast; citations older than 12 months must be verified via WebSearch before anchoring a recommendation.
